claim: Letters are produced by a LangGraph pipeline with load_context -> planner -> drafter -> polisher nodes.
Daily letter delivery has a main entry point in delivery/daily.py.
Persona definitions (Seneca, Marcus Aurelius, Nietzsche, Camus, Simone Weil) live in personas/registry.py with a get_persona lookup.
The FastAPI HTTP server exposes web endpoints including a list_philosophers API.
RAG retrieval has a chromadb backend with a TF-IDF fallback, selected at runtime.
